nodes.context: Large street gang based in New Zealand, mainly in South Auckland. Founded in 2003 as a spin-off of the Tribesmen gang.
Larger gang from which Killer Beez spun off. Formerly allied with Killer Beez, later in conflict.
New Zealand gang listed as an ally of Killer Beez in the infobox.
Street gang listed as an ally of Killer Beez in the infobox.
Gang listed as an ally of Killer Beez in the infobox.
Street gang listed as a rival of Killer Beez in the infobox.
New Zealand gang listed as a rival of Killer Beez in the infobox.
Gang involved in a shooting with Killer Beez in October 2017.

edges.evidence_quote: They were founded in 2003, as a large rogue street gang in Ōtara, as a spin-off of the larger 'Tribesmen' gang.
edges.context: Killer Beez was founded as a spin-off of the Tribesmen gang.

edges.evidence_quote: On 26 April 2019 Killer Beez head Josh Masters, a prominent gang member was shot by a member of the Tribesmen at a Harley Davidson dealership in Mount Wellington, Auckland.
edges.context: A Tribesmen member shot Killer Beez leader Josh Masters, indicating conflict.

edges.evidence_quote: In May 2022, conflicts between the Tribesmen and Killer Beez led to shootings in South Auckland.
edges.context: Conflicts between the two gangs led to multiple shootings.

edges.evidence_quote: Allies: Black Power , Crips , BTW (Bad Troublesome Ward)
edges.context: Black Power is listed as an ally of Killer Beez in the infobox.

edges.evidence_quote: Allies: Black Power , Crips , BTW (Bad Troublesome Ward)
edges.context: Crips is listed as an ally of Killer Beez in the infobox.

edges.evidence_quote: Allies: Black Power , Crips , BTW (Bad Troublesome Ward)
edges.context: BTW is listed as an ally of Killer Beez in the infobox.
Bloods is listed as a rival of Killer Beez in the infobox.
Mongrel Mob is listed as a rival of Killer Beez in the infobox.

edges.evidence_quote: In October 2017, members of the Killer Beez and the 36 (Three Six) gangs were involved in a shooting, where three males in Ōtara were shot in a drive-by shooting.
edges.context: Members of both gangs were involved in a shooting together, indicating cooperation.
